response.original_title: Dude Tries To Return Lost Stuff But Communicates Poorly And Dies
response.overview: A young woman in a park mistakes a struggling dad trying to get home for his daughter's Halloween party for a masked murderer. He tries to be a Good Samaritan and return her lost stuff, but she kills him for it.
response.tagline: Dude Tries To Return Lost Stuff But Communicates Poorly And Dies
response.title: Dude Tries To Return Lost Stuff But Communicates Poorly And Dies
